loop1.title: Events KPI Strip
loop1.note: Showing panel-aggregate event counts and worst-panel readings from 6 active feeders; 2 feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark and honest-blanked.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: Showing AI narrative summary for 8 active feeders; UPS-06 and UPS-07 are dark (no data).

loop1.title: Event Timeline at {period}
loop1.note: Showing event counts and worst deviations for PRIMARY members (GIC-01-N3-UPS-01 through GIC-02-N7-UPS-06); members with no data (GIC-02-N6-UPS-05, GIC-02-N7-UPS-06) are honest-blanked.

loop1.title: Current Distribution at {period}
loop1.note: Showing current_avg per outgoing feeder; sag/swell/voltage/unbalance/neutral metrics are not measured by this panel's aggregate table and are honest-blanked.

loop1.title: Other Panels Event at {period}
loop1.note: Showing per-panel event counts and voltage/current metrics for the 8 primary outgoing feeders; 2 context-only incomers (Solar Incomer-1, Solar Incomer-2) are listed but have no live data.
